title: Developer Progress Handoff
description: Typed handoff payload produced by implementation agents when handing completed or partial work back to the governor or review auditor. Compliance is instruction-enforced, not constrained-decoding enforced.

type.description: Payload type discriminator. Must always be 'dev_progress'.

producedBy.description: Name of the implementation agent that produced this payload (e.g., 'Backend Implementation Specialist', 'Frontend Implementation Specialist', 'Implementation Specialist').

producedAt.description: ISO date string (YYYY-MM-DD) when this payload was produced.

workPackage.description: Identifier matching the WP-id or task description from the governor's delegation.

status.description: 'completed': all assigned AC are done; 'partial': subset done, remainder delegated or deferred; 'blocked': cannot proceed without unblocking a prerequisite.

filesModified.description: Paths of all files created or modified during this work unit.

testsRan.description: Whether tests were executed before producing this handoff.

testsPassed.description: Whether all relevant tests passed at the time of this handoff.

testCommand.description: Exact test command that was run.

testSummary.description: Brief human-readable test result summary, e.g. '14 passed, 0 failed'.

blockersIfAny.description: Description of blockers if status is 'blocked'. Use 'none' if no blockers.

recommendedNextAgent.description: Name of the agent the governor should delegate to next (typically a Review Auditor or Test Specialist).

notes.description: Optional notes on decisions made, deferred items, or non-obvious implementation choices.
